value.description:
A cyberbrain built for close combat. Its rebuilt cortex reads an opponent's guard and commits the body to the opening, sharpening every part of melee.
<color=#e6e6e6ff><size=11.8>Aegis Duelist modifiers:</size><size=10.2>
Cortex module slots: 3 Consciousness: +25% Manipulation: +10% Learning Speed: +50% Research Speed: +5% Melee Hit Chance: +6 Melee Dodge Chance: +8 Move Speed: +12% Melee Cooldown Factor: -25% Melee Damage Factor: +10%
Mental Break Threshold: +10% Social Fight Chance: +50% </size></color>
A cyberbrain built for close combat. Its rebuilt cortex reads an opponent's guard and commits the body to the opening, sharpening every part of melee.

A cyberbrain tuned for the fields, carrying a grower's judgement for planting, tending and harvest so the wearer brings in more from the same ground.
<color=#e6e6e6ff><size=11.8>Civis Agrarian modifiers:</size><size=10.2>
Cortex module slots: 3 Consciousness: +25% Manipulation: +10% Learning Speed: +50% Research Speed: +5% Plant Work Speed: +30% Plant Harvest Yield: +18% Drug Harvest Yield: +18% Pruning Speed: +25%
Mental Break Threshold: +10% Social Fight Chance: +50% </size></color>
A cyberbrain tuned for the fields, carrying a grower's judgement for planting, tending and harvest so the wearer brings in more from the same ground.

A cyberbrain built for the gun, steadying aim and shortening the time from sighting to shot.
<color=#e6e6e6ff><size=11.8>Aegis Gunner modifiers:</size><size=10.2>
Cortex module slots: 3 Consciousness: +25% Manipulation: +10% Learning Speed: +50% Research Speed: +5% Shooting Accuracy: +6 Aiming Delay Factor: -25% Ranged Cooldown Factor: -25%
Mental Break Threshold: +10% Social Fight Chance: +50% </size></color>
A cyberbrain built for the gun, steadying aim and shortening the time from sighting to shot.

A deeper combat cyberbrain that refuses to specialise, staying competent with blade and gun alike.
<color=#e6e6e6ff><size=11.8>Aegis Vanguard modifiers:</size><size=10.2>
Cortex module slots: 4 Consciousness: +30% Manipulation: +15% Learning Speed: +60% Research Speed: +10% Shooting Accuracy: +6 Aiming Delay: -20% Ranged Cooldown: -20% Mortar Miss Radius: -8% Melee Hit Chance: +4 Melee Dodge Chance: +6 Hacking Speed: +100% Move Speed: 20% Melee Cooldown: -35% Melee Damage: +20%
Mental Break Threshold: +12% Social Fight Chance: +50% </size></color>
A deeper combat cyberbrain that refuses to specialise, staying competent with blade and gun alike.

A deeper cyberbrain carrying both construction and crafting, for a worker who builds and fabricates in one body.
<color=#e6e6e6ff><size=11.8>Civis Foundry modifiers:</size><size=10.2>
Cortex module slots: 4 Consciousness: +30% Manipulation: +15% Learning Speed: +60% Research Speed: +10% General Labor Speed: +35% Smelting Speed: +35% Construction Speed: +35% Construction Success Chance: +18% Smoothing Speed: +30% Repair Success Chance: +18%
Mental Break Threshold: +12% Social Fight Chance: +50% </size></color>
A deeper cyberbrain carrying both construction and crafting, for a worker who builds and fabricates in one body.

A deeper rebuild than the basic model, replacing more of the cerebrum with microcircuitry for faster thought and better memory. It is not tuned toward any one kind of work.
<color=#e6e6e6ff><size=11.8>Enhanced Cyberbrain modifiers:</size><size=10.2>
Cortex module slots: 2 Consciousness: +25% Manipulation: +10% Learning Speed: +50% Research Speed: +5%
Mental Break Threshold: +8% Social Fight Chance: +50% </size></color>
A deeper rebuild than the basic model, replacing more of the cerebrum with microcircuitry for faster thought and better memory. It is not tuned toward any one kind of work.

A deeper cyberbrain for long-range fire, built around reacquiring and holding a distant target.
<color=#e6e6e6ff><size=11.8>Aegis Sniper modifiers:</size><size=10.2>
Cortex module slots: 4 Consciousness: +30% Manipulation: +15% Learning Speed: +60% Research Speed: +10% Shooting Accuracy: +10 Aiming Delay: -50% Ranged Cooldown: -50% Mortar Miss Radius: -10%
Mental Break Threshold: +12% Social Fight Chance: +50% </size></color>
A deeper cyberbrain for long-range fire, built around reacquiring and holding a distant target.

The entry model. Micromachines lay a partial lattice through the cortex, giving the wearer a direct link to cybernetic hardware. It carries no work skill of its own and leaves most of the brain intact, so it brings no instability.
<color=#e6e6e6ff><size=11.8>Basic Cyberbrain modifiers:</size><size=10.2>
Cortex module slots: 1 Consciousness: +10% Manipulation: +5% Learning Speed: +5% </size></color>

The entry model. Micromachines lay a partial lattice through the cortex, giving the wearer a direct link to cybernetic hardware. It carries no work skill of its own and leaves most of the brain intact, so it brings no instability.

A cyberbrain built for heavy melee, trading speed for raw force. It suits heavy weapons.
<color=#e6e6e6ff><size=11.8>Aegis Reaver modifiers:</size><size=10.2>
Cortex module slots: 3 Consciousness: +25% Manipulation: +10% Learning Speed: +50% Research Speed: +5% Melee Hit Chance: +8 Melee Dodge Chance: +8 Melee Damage Factor: +100%
Mental Break Threshold: +10% Social Fight Chance: +50% Melee Cooldown Factor: +35% </size></color>
A cyberbrain built for heavy melee, trading speed for raw force. It suits heavy weapons.

A deeper cyberbrain pairing the workshop with the lab, carrying both crafting and research.
<color=#e6e6e6ff><size=11.8>Civis Engineering modifiers:</size><size=10.2>
Cortex module slots: 4 Consciousness: +30% Manipulation: +15% Learning Speed: +60% Research Speed: +45% General Labor Speed: +30% Smelting Speed: +30% Reading Speed: +30% Hacking Speed: +185%
Mental Break Threshold: +12% Social Fight Chance: +50% </size></color>
A deeper cyberbrain pairing the workshop with the lab, carrying both crafting and research.

A cyberbrain tuned for talk. It reads faces and cadence and prompts the wearer, lifting trade, negotiation and recruitment.
<color=#e6e6e6ff><size=11.8>Civis Diplomatic modifiers:</size><size=10.2>
Cortex module slots: 3 Consciousness: +25% Manipulation: +10% Learning Speed: +50% Research Speed: +5% Negotiation Ability: +30% Social Impact: +18% Trade Price Improvement: +15% Arrest Success Chance: +25% Suppression Power: +25% Conversion Power: +20%
Mental Break Threshold: +10% </size></color>
A cyberbrain tuned for talk. It reads faces and cadence and prompts the wearer, lifting trade, negotiation and recruitment.

The Civis flagship. Almost the whole cortex is rebuilt, carrying every trade the maker ever put in a brain at once. It holds no combat capability. So little living brain remains that the wearer's moods run high and they crack far more easily under pressure.
<color=#e6e6e6ff><size=11.8>Civis PX-7 modifiers:</size><size=10.2>
Cortex module slots: 5 Consciousness: +50% Manipulation: +25% Moving: +10% Sight: +25% Hearing: +25% Learning Speed: +100% General Labor Speed: +50% Construction Speed: +65% Mining Speed: +50% Cooking Speed: +65% Smoothing Speed: +90% Drug Production Speed: +65% Smelting Speed: +60% Butcher Speed: +100% Butcher Efficiency: +80% Plant Work Speed: +50% Plant Harvest Yield: +80% Drug Harvest Yield: +80% Pruning Speed: +50% Food Poison Chance: -25% Tending Speed: +20% Operation Speed: +35% Tending Quality: +10% Surgery Success Chance: +20% Reading Speed: +35% Research Speed: +50% Social Impact: +18% Negotiation Ability: +35% Trade Price Improvement: +18% Arrest Success Chance: +10% Hacking Speed: +200% Move Speed: +10%
Mental Break Threshold: +20% Social Fight Chance: +400% </size></color>

The Civis flagship. Almost the whole cortex is rebuilt, carrying every trade the maker ever put in a brain at once. It holds no combat capability. So little living brain remains that the wearer's moods run high and they crack far more easily under pressure.

A cyberbrain tuned for the kitchen. Its rebuilt cortex carries a cook's skill at food and butchery, so meals come faster and less is wasted.
<color=#e6e6e6ff><size=11.8>Civis Culinary modifiers:</size><size=10.2>
Cortex module slots: 3 Consciousness: +25% Manipulation: +10% Learning Speed: +50% Research Speed: +5% Cooking Speed: +30% Drug Production Speed: +30% Food Poison Chance: -25% Butcher Speed: +30% Butcher Efficiency: +18%
Mental Break Threshold: +10% Social Fight Chance: +50% </size></color>
A cyberbrain tuned for the kitchen. Its rebuilt cortex carries a cook's skill at food and butchery, so meals come faster and less is wasted.

A cyberbrain tuned for building. Its rebuilt cortex holds a builder's instinct for structure and repair, and the work goes up faster and stands longer.
<color=#e6e6e6ff><size=11.8>Civis Construction modifiers:</size><size=10.2>
Cortex module slots: 3 Consciousness: +25% Manipulation: +10% Learning Speed: +50% Research Speed: +5% Construction Speed: +30% Construction Success Chance: +18% Smoothing Speed: +25% Repair Success Chance: +18%
Mental Break Threshold: +10% Social Fight Chance: +50% </size></color>
A cyberbrain tuned for building. Its rebuilt cortex holds a builder's instinct for structure and repair, and the work goes up faster and stands longer.

A cyberbrain tuned for the rock face. It reads strata and drives faster mining and deep drilling.
<color=#e6e6e6ff><size=11.8>Civis Mining modifiers:</size><size=10.2>
Cortex module slots: 3 Consciousness: +25% Manipulation: +10% Learning Speed: +50% Research Speed: +5% Mining Speed: +30% Mining Yield: +18% Deep Drilling Speed: +30% Smoothing Speed: +25%
Mental Break Threshold: +10% Social Fight Chance: +50% </size></color>
A cyberbrain tuned for the rock face. It reads strata and drives faster mining and deep drilling.

The Aegis flagship. The wearer shoots and moves at the very limit of a human body. So little living brain remains that the mind runs badly unstable, prone to violent swings and to breaking under pressure.
<color=#e6e6e6ff><size=11.8>Aegis HADES modifiers:</size><size=10.2>
Cortex module slots: 5 Consciousness: +50% Manipulation: +25% Moving: +10% Sight: +25% Hearing: +25% Learning Speed: +100% Research Speed: +20% Shooting Accuracy: +12 Aiming Delay: -65% Ranged Cooldown: -65% Mortar Miss Radius: -20% Melee Hit Chance: +12 Melee Dodge Chance: +18 Hacking Speed: +120% Move Speed: +50% Melee Cooldown: -25% Melee Damage: +35%
Mental Break Threshold: +20% Social Fight Chance: +400% </size></color>

The Aegis flagship. The wearer shoots and moves at the very limit of a human body. So little living brain remains that the mind runs badly unstable, prone to violent swings and to breaking under pressure.

A cyberbrain built for fast melee, favouring dodges and quick strikes. It suits light weapons.
<color=#e6e6e6ff><size=11.8>Aegis Skirmisher modifiers:</size><size=10.2>
Cortex module slots: 3 Consciousness: +25% Manipulation: +10% Learning Speed: +50% Research Speed: +5% Melee Hit Chance: +4 Melee Dodge Chance: +12 Melee Cooldown Factor: -50% Move Speed: 25%
Mental Break Threshold: +10% Social Fight Chance: +50% Melee Damage Factor: -25% </size></color>
A cyberbrain built for fast melee, favouring dodges and quick strikes. It suits light weapons.

A cyberbrain tuned for medicine, laying anatomy and procedure over the surgeon's view to raise tending quality and surgical success.
<color=#e6e6e6ff><size=11.8>Civis Medical modifiers:</size><size=10.2>
Cortex module slots: 3 Consciousness: +25% Manipulation: +10% Learning Speed: +50% Research Speed: +5% Tending Speed: +30% Operation Speed: +30% Tend Quality: +18% Surgery Success Chance: +25%
Mental Break Threshold: +10% Social Fight Chance: +50% </size></color>
A cyberbrain tuned for medicine, laying anatomy and procedure over the surgeon's view to raise tending quality and surgical success.

A cyberbrain tuned for the lab and the terminal, speeding research, data work and hacking.
<color=#e6e6e6ff><size=11.8>Civis Analytic modifiers:</size><size=10.2>
Cortex module slots: 3 Consciousness: +25% Manipulation: +10% Learning Speed: +50% Research Speed: +35% Reading Speed: +30% Hacking Speed: +150%
Mental Break Threshold: +10% Social Fight Chance: +50% </size></color>
A cyberbrain tuned for the lab and the terminal, speeding research, data work and hacking.

A deeper melee cyberbrain, built for a soldier meant to close and win a fight outright.
<color=#e6e6e6ff><size=11.8>Aegis Warden modifiers:</size><size=10.2>
Cortex module slots: 4 Consciousness: +30% Manipulation: +15% Learning Speed: +60% Research Speed: +10% Melee Hit Chance: +8 Melee Dodge Chance: +12 Move Speed: +25% Melee Cooldown Factor: -15% Melee Damage Factor: +20%
Mental Break Threshold: +12% Social Fight Chance: +50% </size></color>
A deeper melee cyberbrain, built for a soldier meant to close and win a fight outright.

A deeper cyberbrain carrying both the kitchen and the fields, for a colonist who cooks and farms in one body.
<color=#e6e6e6ff><size=11.8>Civis Homestead modifiers:</size><size=10.2>
Cortex module slots: 4 Consciousness: +30% Manipulation: +15% Learning Speed: +60% Research Speed: +10% Plant Work Speed: +35% Plant Harvest Yield: +18% Drug Harvest Yield: +18% Pruning Speed: +30% Cooking Speed: +35% Drug Production Speed: +35% Food Poison Chance: -25% Butcher Speed: +35% Butcher Efficiency: +18%
Mental Break Threshold: +12% Social Fight Chance: +50% </size></color>
A deeper cyberbrain carrying both the kitchen and the fields, for a colonist who cooks and farms in one body.

A cyberbrain built for precision fire, solving range and lead for a single accurate shot. It suits long marksman weapons.
<color=#e6e6e6ff><size=11.8>Aegis Marksman modifiers:</size><size=10.2>
Cortex module slots: 3 Consciousness: +25% Manipulation: +10% Learning Speed: +50% Research Speed: +5% Shooting Accuracy: +12
Mental Break Threshold: +10% Social Fight Chance: +50% Aiming Delay Factor: +35% Ranged Cooldown Factor: +35% </size></color>
A cyberbrain built for precision fire, solving range and lead for a single accurate shot. It suits long marksman weapons.

A cyberbrain tuned for the workshop and smelter, carrying fabrication and crafting skill and speeding heavy labour.
<color=#e6e6e6ff><size=11.8>Civis Industrial modifiers:</size><size=10.2>
Cortex module slots: 3 Consciousness: +25% Manipulation: +10% Learning Speed: +50% Research Speed: +5% General Labor Speed: +30% Smelting Speed: +30%
Mental Break Threshold: +10% Social Fight Chance: +50% </size></color>
A cyberbrain tuned for the workshop and smelter, carrying fabrication and crafting skill and speeding heavy labour.
